title: peucedanum zeyheri
intro: Peucedanum zeyheri, also known as Cape turnip-root or Zeyher's peucedanum, is a plant species that belongs to the carrot family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. Its health benefits include relief from fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and anti-parasitic agent. Peucedanum zeyheri can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
